title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 52.050 - Failure to give bond — penalty
text:
52.050.  Failure to give bond — penalty. — If any collector shall neglect or refuse to give bond, as required by section 52.020, his office shall, immediately upon such neglect or refusal, be vacant.
(RSMo 1939 § 11058) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9887; 1919 § 12879; 1909 § 11436
